Metadata.SourceFile: Professional BMX Simulator (Standard New Tracks - Quarry).tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1000 "PROFESSIONALBMXSIMULATOR-STANDARD-QUARRY-1000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Professional BMX Simulator (Standard - Quarry).prg"
Metadata.Notes: This version can only be loaded by first loading the Standard - Dirt tape and then pressing L on the title screen.
